body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9793", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-347", "name": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature"}], "description": "A flaw was found in Keycloak. When a JSON Web Encryption (JWE) encrypted request object is submitted, Keycloak may incorrectly process unsigned claims if the decrypted content is raw JSON, bypassing the configured signature policy. This allows a remote attacker to submit unauthorized claims, leading to a compromise of data integrity within the OpenID Connect (OIDC) authorization flow. While a redirect URI allowlist acts as a compensating control, this vulnerability violates OIDC Core and Financial-grade API (FAPI) signing requirements.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0012, "percentile": 0.02119}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p3v8-fm5p-v84h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T21:23:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p3v8-fm5p-v84h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p3v8-fm5p-v84h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9793"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T05:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T06:31:09Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9793", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-9793", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2482460", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/49429", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p3v8-fm5p-v84h"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak", "summary": "Keycloak has an Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T21:23:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p3v8-fm5p-v84h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.keycloak:keycloak-services"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 26.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
